message:
fix(ftui-layout): resolve serde roundtrip failure caused by duplicate extensions keys in flattened pane JSON

PaneNodeRecord uses #[serde(flatten)] on PaneNodeKind, which merges the
fields of PaneLeaf (including its `extensions` map) into the same JSON
object as PaneNodeRecord's own `extensions` map. This produced duplicate
"extensions" keys in serialized JSON, causing serde_json to reject
deserialization — making workspace snapshots non-portable across
serialize/deserialize boundaries.

The fix renames PaneLeaf.extensions to "leaf_extensions" in the wire
format via #[serde(rename = "leaf_extensions")], giving each extension
bag a unique JSON key. Both extension maps also gain skip_serializing_if
= "BTreeMap::is_empty" to keep serialized output compact when no
extensions are present (which is the common case).

Adds a comprehensive roundtrip test that sets extensions at every scope
level (workspace, tree, node, leaf) and verifies they survive a full
serialize -> deserialize cycle. The previous test comment noting this was
"blocked by a known upstream issue" is replaced with the working coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
